title: Pressable animates on the JS thread
message: Your users feel a choppy press when <Pressable> onPressIn animates on the JS thread.
help: This press animation runs on the JS thread, so it can stutter. Wrap it in <GestureDetector gesture={Gesture.Tap()...}> to run it on the UI thread.

title: Pressable animates on the JS thread
message: Your users feel a choppy press when <Pressable> onPressOut animates on the JS thread.
help: This press animation runs on the JS thread, so it can stutter. Wrap it in <GestureDetector gesture={Gesture.Tap()...}> to run it on the UI thread.
